summary: Iteration 2 (v2.0) testing - Backend 100% pass (19/19), Frontend 100% pass. All v2.0 features working correctly: GPT-4o integration, alerts.in.ua (demo mode), Copernicus Marine eco data with wave_height/coordinates, WebSocket SentryNode for panic alarms. All frontend screens updated with v2.0 features including Live/Demo badge, data sources footer, Copernicus attribution, and WebSocket status.

react_native_issues.issue: Warning: Animated: `useNativeDriver` is not supported in web preview. Falls back to JS-based animation. Not critical, expected behavior for web preview.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All v2.0 backend APIs return proper status codes (200 OK)
✅ GET /api/ returns v2.0 with features array ['alerts.in.ua', 'copernicus', 'websocket', 'gpt-4o']
✅ GET /api/alerts/live returns has_live_connection field (False in demo mode)
✅ GET /api/sentry/ws-status returns connected_clients count
✅ GET /api/coastal/eco includes Copernicus Marine source, wave_height, lat, lng fields
✅ POST /api/chat uses gpt-4o model (confirmed in backend logs)
✅ GET /api/dashboard includes alert_source and has_live_alerts fields
✅ POST /api/alerts/toggle correctly syncs is_air_raid and is_storm together
✅ POST /api/sentry/panic creates alarm and broadcasts via WebSocket
✅ Frontend shows Live/Demo badge correctly (Demo mode active)
✅ Frontend auto-polling setup correct (30 second interval on line 74 of index.tsx)
✅ Frontend shows data sources footer (alerts.in.ua • Copernicus Marine • ДСНС)
✅ Map eco layer shows Copernicus Marine attribution card
✅ Map eco data displays wave_height and coordinates
✅ Map safety layer shows zone coordinates
✅ Profile shows WebSocket connection status (SentryNode: Відключено)
✅ Profile panic button functional (alarm created successfully)
✅ All 5 tabs render correctly
✅ MongoDB _id properly excluded from responses
✅ All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✅ All interactive elements have testID attributes

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/19 tests passed - up from 16 in iteration 1)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All v2.0 features working - Home screen with Live/Demo badge and data sources footer, Map with Copernicus Marine data and coordinates, Profile with WebSocket status and functional panic button, All 5 tabs rendering correctly)

seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Backend seed data updated with Copernicus Marine eco data (wave_height, lat, lng, source fields).
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.0 fully functional. Backend 100% working (19/19 API endpoints tested and passing). Frontend 100% working with all v2.0 features: GPT-4o chatbot, alerts.in.ua integration (demo mode), Copernicus Marine eco data with wave heights and coordinates, WebSocket SentryNode for panic alarms. All screens updated with v2.0 UI elements. No issues found.
